title: What if Rei Was More Like Solid Snake
display_title: What if Rei Was More Like Solid Snake
wikitext:
[]: What if Rei Was More Like Solid Snake?             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:32 am alrighy, so we have did some What If scenarios for Shinji, so lets do something different Rei Ayanami: Clone of Yui Ikari Solid Snake: Clone of Big Boss probably not a whole lot to discuss, but alas, its always interesting to try, because I would pay big bucks to see the Pilot of Unit 00 to suddenly turn badass

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Dec 29, 2009 7:00 am She wouldn't take any shit from people (specifically Asuka) and sleep in a cardboard box.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue Dec 29, 2009 7:40 am What if Kaworu was more like the Fonz? EDIT: More questions: What if Kaji was more like Mr Ed? What if Misato was more like Adam West? What if Kensuke had the power of flight? What if Maya had three legs and nipples for eyes? What if up was down, and down was up and geese farted fire?

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Tue Dec 29, 2009 12:41 pm she would smoke cigars and only be seen when she felt like it. Rie would also quickly get frustrated about repeatingly laying back down from crouching when she really wanted to get up and walk.....god damn controls.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Dec 29, 2009 1:32 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: She wouldn't take any shit from people (specifically Asuka) and sleep in a cardboard box.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:25 pm master_lloyd wrote: What if up was down, and down was up and geese farted fire?

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:29 pm I can imagine the scene where she & Kaworu first talk would be a near imitation of the big scene between Solid & Liquid

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:29 pm I can just see the battle with the 5th Angel. Shinji: I cant Aim, I cant focus (Presses R1, Selects Pentazamin).

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:30 pm also, when she sacrifices herself, a game over screen will show up with the cast screaming out her name

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:34 pm GasmaskAvenger wrote: also, when she sacrifices herself, a game over screen will show up with the cast screaming out her name

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:36 pm master_lloyd wrote: What if Maya had three legs and nipples for eyes?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:44 pm NemZ wrote: master_lloyd wrote: What if Maya had three legs and nipples for eyes?

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Tue Dec 29, 2009 4:10 pm

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Tue Dec 29, 2009 6:52 pm I can just imagine David Hayter voiceing Rei... Rei: Gendo, this is Rei, i've reached the sneaking point.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 29, 2009 7:48 pm just the idea of either Amanda or Briana trying to sound all gruff & tough as this version of Rei would be gold plus, seeing Kaworu as Raiden would be funny Kaworu: Sir, we have avoided drowning Keelz: Good

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Tue Dec 29, 2009 8:53 pm I see Shinji as Raiden (MGS2 Raiden). Asuka is Rosemary, Gendo is Col. Campbell.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Dec 29, 2009 8:56 pm scarmullet wrote: I see Shinji as Raiden (MGS2 Raiden).

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 29, 2009 8:56 pm man MGS2 would be like a typical episode of EVA Rei starts out with some sizable screentime, then someone else comes in & steals all the attention, much like what Raiden (MGS2. He was awesome in Guns of the Patriots) did to Snake but alas, it would make sense Joseph the PRPD wrote: That kinda makes sense actually. Also MGS4 Raiden a bit to. Since he has some inner conflict.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Tue Dec 29, 2009 9:01 pm Shinji: Rei, can love bloom on the battlefield?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Dec 29, 2009 9:07 pm Does that mean in the third game its actually Yui?
summary:
